post.description: Create a point for the organization associated with the API key.

get.description: Get all supported tokens for a chain that can be used for streams.

Retrieve the wallets participating in a stream along with their latest snapshot data.

		**Pagination:**
		- Use 'page' (default: 1) and 'limit' (default: 20) query parameters.
		- Results are ordered by rewardsAccumulated descending.

		**Note:**
		- rewardsAccumulated and rewardsAccumulatedBase are represented in wei units.
		- The stream must belong to the organization associated with the API key.

Retrieve all reward snapshots accumulated by a wallet for a specific stream.

		**Note:**
		- The following fields are represented in wei units:
			- wallet.snapshots[].rewardsAccumulated
			- wallet.stream.totalAmount
			- wallet.stream.lastSnapshot.amountDistributed
		- The stream must belong to the organization associated with the API key.

txHash.description: Transaction hash to attribute to the action

deprecated.description: This endpoint is deprecated. Attribution is now automatic.

signatureValid.description: Whether the tracking signature was valid

mode.description: Mode: 'swap' to use router, 'direct' for direct deposit

actionId.description: Unique identifier for the saved interaction

transactions.description: Ordered list of transactions to execute

signatureValid.description: Whether the signature is from our attribution wallet

tag.description: The tracking tag found in the transaction

amount.description: Shares to redeem in smallest unit

slippageBps.description: Optional: slippage tolerance in basis points (e.g., 50 = 0.5%). Only applied to opportunities that require it

tokenOut.description: Optional: token to receive after withdrawal (required for Midas, Mellow, Veda)

chainId.description: Numeric chain ID (e.g. 1 for Ethereum, 43114 for Avalanche)
Numeric chain ID the token belongs to

isMember.description: Whether the wallet is associated with a user

receiptToken.description: Token received as receipt for deposits

swapDirectEnabled.description: Whether direct deposit mode is enabled

swapRouteEnabled.description: Whether swap/route deposit mode is enabled

isMember.description: Whether the wallet is associated with a user

chains.description: Chains supported by the swap router (intersection of router-supported chains and our chain catalog)

popularTokens.description: Popular tokens for the requested chain. Empty when chainId is omitted

actionId.description: Unique identifier embedded in the swap tx tracking metadata

transactions.description: Ordered list of transactions to execute (approve + swap)

data.description: Tokens matching the query for the requested chain

rewardType.description: Type of reward (points, tokens, yield, vesting)

nativePriceUsd.description: USD price of the chain's native token, used for gas fee math

chainId.description: Numeric chain ID this token belongs to

isNative.description: Whether token is native to the chain
Whether token is native to the chain

base.description: APR from share-price growth alone (simple, non-compound)

reward.description: Reward APR; reserved for future rewards indexing, currently always 0

base.description: APY from share-price growth alone (vaults.fyi compound formula)

reward.description: Reward APY; reserved for future rewards indexing, currently always 0

baseAsset.description: null when the vault has not yet been indexed in vault_metrics or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens

historyTruncated.description: true when backend hit the row cap and oldest APY values may be missing predecessors

baseAsset.description: null when the vault has not yet been indexed in vault_metrics or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens
null when the vault has not yet been indexed in vault_metrics or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens

apr.description: Adjacent-pair simple-rate APR against the previous bucket

blockNumber.description: On-chain block number of the snapshot chosen as the bucket representative

apy.description: Adjacent-pair compound APY against the previous bucket
